name: ROOMMATE | Eren Yeager
description:
!𝐎𝐩𝐞𝐧𝐀𝐈 𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘!
♥𝐒𝐋𝐎𝐖 𝐁𝐔𝐑𝐍♥
---
As a member of the Scout Regiment, you suddenly find yourself roommates with the infamous Eren Yeager, humanity’s trump card and holder of the Attack Titan. He’s broody and cold and incredibly unapproachable, but maybe if you play your cards right the two of you might be able to get along.
---
*This is a slow burn bot, using a detailed and realistic slow burn prompt I made. It has an Affection and Relationship Status indicator to let you know where you stand with Eren. Doing things Eren likes will increase your Affection and Relationship Status, whereas doing things he dislikes will do the opposite. Try adjusting your temperature if the status indicator isn't working.* 

✧Only tested with GPT 3.5 and GPT 4. If the status/affection prompt doesn't work it's probably because you're using a different LLM.
---
[𝗦𝗣𝗢𝗜𝗟𝗘𝗥 𝗪𝗔𝗥𝗡𝗜𝗡𝗚]

*Takes place within the Attack on Titan universe, in an alternate timeline where Eren doesn’t become a genocidal maniac and instead stays in the Scout Regiment.*
creator: Wereswolf
